name: Woody Cross
description: Woody Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind. Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday! Woody Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges. Features: 6000+ challenging levels. Well designed grass & wooden theme. Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary! Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers. No time limit, no pressure.
instructions: Swipe to connect letters in any direction to make words Find the hidden words and fill in the crossword grid to win levels Complete levels to earn bonus rewards
